component.name: Claude Code Sessions
component.summary: Browse and resume your Claude Code sessions

description.p: A small GTK4 / libadwaita dashboard that lists every Claude Code session found under ~/.claude/projects, newest first, showing each session's title and working directory.

ul.li: Search across session titles, working directories, and conversation content
Resume any session in your default terminal with one click
Delete sessions you no longer need (moved to the trash)
